home-hero-subtitle: Don’t guess — check before you post.
home-benefit-1: ✅ Pre-check any video, image or audio
home-about-content: CheckReel is an AlWafir service specialising in social-media management, AI apps and precision marketing. We help creators analyse videos, images and audio to ensure policy compliance — saving time, protecting brand image and reducing sanctions risk.
dashboard-intro: CheckReel protects your content before publishing — with smart analysis that prevents bans, mutes or demonetisation. Check TikTok, Instagram, YouTube and more. 🚀 Upgrade to CheckReel+ to save checks, export results and raise limits.
dashboard-upload-note: 💡 Supported formats: mp4, jpg, png, mp3, wav, mov, webm, gif, aac, opus
dashboard-upgrade-note: 🚀 Upgrade to CheckReel+ to save analyses, speed up checks and unlock all features — $9.99/month
dash-welcome: CheckReel scans your content against the latest platform policies, flags potential violations before you post, and keeps your files private — so you stay compliant and protected.
dash-step1: 1️⃣ Upload your video, image or audio.
dash-step3: 3️⃣ Hit Scan to get an instant report.
dash-disclaimer: Disclaimer: CheckReel provides automated compliance insights. Final responsibility for publishing decisions remains with the user.
